name: Individual Types
description: Foundation-level ontology defining individual types across B2B, B2C, and B2B2C contexts. B2B types subclass RRR roles with org relation. B2C types are standalone. ICP (VP-ONT) groups individuals; IND defines the types within.

joinPatterns: JP-IND-ORG-001: B2B IndividualType hasOrgRelation to Organization
JP-IND-PE-001: IndividualTypes participate in PE customer journey processes (DR-IND-005)
JP-IND-ANT-001: IndividualType maps to Owner/Appraiser domain entities

creator: OAA Generator
